title: Serialize and Deserialize Binary Tree
problem_statement: Design algorithms to serialize a binary tree to a string and deserialize it back to the original tree.

examples.explanation: The serialized string can be used to reconstruct the same tree.

constraints: The number of nodes is in the range [0, 10^4]
intuition: Use preorder traversal with null markers to uniquely encode the tree structure.

approaches.name: Preorder serialization with null markers
approaches.description: Serialize using DFS and "null" placeholders, then deserialize by reading values in the same order.
approaches.why_not: Level order serialization is also valid, but preorder is straightforward for recursion.

interview_qa.a: They preserve tree structure and distinguish missing children.
It reads the serialized tokens in order and reconstructs nodes recursively.
